channel.title: Syrup on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Syrup on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Gingerbread Latte Recipe (Homemade Syrup + Starbucks Copycat)
item.description: Make a gingerbread latte at home with homemade gingerbread syrup. Hot, iced, or as a Starbucks copycat — this spiced holiday coffee recipe is easy and delicious.
